title: Support  - Device with device connected
scenario: User views device details modal from Support > Device menu after connecting a headset
steps: Pair and connect a headset to the device.
Select a device from the list.
expected: A modal slides up from the bottom showing detailed device information (Device Name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, HW Revision, Last Connected) with a "Go" button. The background is blurred and the modal includes the message: "Send the detailed information to Support. Take a screen shot or write down the below details for a faster process."
